-- 2 of 13 --

Everyone Starts at the beginning…
▪ 	I started my first online business in 1996
▪ 	I studied the stock market for several years before I
decided to publish a newsletter and start building a list
▪ 	I had no technical knowledge and couldn’t afford web
hosting and a domain name
▪ 	I got an ugly site put up on a platform that was free
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 13 --

Everyone Starts at the beginning…
▪ 	I started publishing and building an email list and within
a few months had several hundred subscribers
▪ 	I launched my first product (a paid newsletter) and made
$1650 on my first launch
▪ 	My last big launch was over $5 million dollars
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 13 --

Everyone Starts at the beginning…
▪ 	The most important step is the first one - the action you
take to get going
▪ 	I’ve learned a lot in the last 20+ years and this bonus is
all about how to help you take that first step and get
going quickly
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 13 --

More Important…
▪ 	I’ve coached tens of thousands of people…
▪ 	Some started from zero and some have million-dollar
businesses
▪ 	…But many never went anywhere
▪ 	Or had short term success and then faded away
▪ 	Much of what’s in this course is about the difference
between those two…
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 13 --

This is what I’ve learned about getting Started…
▪ 	You want to get started fast - because momentum brings
more momentum
▪ 	Life is easier when you have momentum
▪ 	But just as important is stamina…
▪ 	This is why I have had success and have been able to
sustain success
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 13 --

This is what I’ve learned about getting Started…
▪ 	I created incremental success…
▪ 	Incremental success is in large part dependent on how
you measure it…
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 13 --

This is what I’ve learned about getting Started…
Measure the right things:
▪ 	Not logos
▪ 	Not fancy design
▪ 	Not social media likes
▪ 	For me it was SUBSCRIBERS
(and I would suggest that’s a good place to start)
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 13 --

This is what I’ve learned about getting Started…
▪ 	I knew subscribers were valuable
▪ 	So I focused on getting more subscribers… every single day
▪ 	One a day
▪ 	Four a day
▪ 	etc…
▪ 	34 a day is 1,000 a month
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 13 --

This is what I’ve learned about getting Started…
▪ 	$1 per month per subscriber is a good benchmark
▪ 	Early on, as I watched subscribers grow, I knew I was
making progress
▪ 	You might want to do the same
▪ 	Social Media followers don’t count
▪ 	You want email subscribers
BONUS - OPERATION QUICK START
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
